headline: Jim Cramer on Becton, Dickinson: “The Company Showed Excellent Execution Across the Board”
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) was one of the stocks featured in Jim Cramer’s Mad Money recap, as he discussed how the AI build-out could power the economy. headline: Becton, Dickinson and Company Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) reported fiscal second-quarter revenue and adjusted earnings ahead of its internal expectations, while management raised its full-year adjusted earnings outlook and said growth was broad-based across most of the portfolio.
